name: site-localspace-semantics-v2
description: Measures semantic coherence of localspace name sets generated by the LS-FILL pipeline. Each run starts the player at depth 2 (site street level) using town/village/city-scale prompts, guaranteeing LS-FILL fires on Turn 1. Then GETs /diagnostics/sites to read active_site. Deterministic metrics: ls_fill_rate (all spaces named?), ls_unique_name_rate (no exact duplicates?), localspace_count, ls_size_spread, ls_mean_size. row_extract captures full local_spaces array for post-run semantic review.
